title: cbasmp
description: A cool minecraft server with the beyond vanilla mod
body:
# what is this server about?
A fun minecraft smp with the [Beyond Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/mod/beyond_vanilla) mod!
Nice comunity where we have lots of fun and sometimes roleplay!!!

# why should i join?
We are a growing comunity and we are friendly towrads new players.

# i need help joining where do i go!
you should join our discord at [discord.cbasmp.xyz](https://discord.cbasmp.xyz)
to get some other info of the server go to [cbasmp.xyz](https://cbasmp.xyz)
